examples: Original acquisition comprises making things, taking possession of ownerless things.
Do not be tempted to collect ownerless articles on the ground and beware of any strangers who approach you on such an excuse. It may be a fraud.
The written application shall clearly state the type and quantity of the property as well as the reasons for applying for ascertaining the ownerless property.
The law states that if freehold land becomes ownerless in the UK, it can pass into the ownership of the monarch in a process called "escheat".
